name: Devkhel
overview: Every Holi in Devtali, a death is blamed on the mythical demon, Shankasur. Inspector Vishwas investigates the latest death, only to uncover an unsettling truth about the alleged divine punishment.

trailers.title: Devkhel | Official Trailer | Marathi ZEE5 Original | Ankush C, Prajakta M, Arun N | Pre 30th Jan
